title: Barbary Coast Gent
writer: William R. Lipman, Grant Garett, Harry Ruskin
actors: Wallace Beery, Binnie Barnes, John Carradine
plot: Honest Plush Brannon is a con-man thrown out of the Barbary Coast in San Francisco in the 1880s and headed for the gold rush region of Nevada. He discovers a real mine which lead to several complications.
